tasks.description: 深度搜索候选高价值论文的详细信息
按 survey-table 7列格式分析所有论文并追加到主表

papers.title: The Perfect Blend: Redefining RLHF with Mixture of Judges
RLAR: An Agentic Reward System for Multi-task RL on LLMs
Secrets of RLHF in LLMs Part I: PPO
Reward Modeling for RL-Based LLM Reasoning Survey
Text2Reward: Reward Shaping with Language Models for RL
Reward Shaping to Mitigate Reward Hacking in RLHF
Zero-Shot LLMs Replacing Human Feedback for Reward Shaping
Extracting Heuristics from LLMs for Reward Shaping
Meta-Thinking in LLMs via Multi-Agent RL: A Survey
Dense Reward for Free in RLHF
AgentRM: Enhancing Agent Generalization with Reward Modeling
PRIME: Process Reinforcement through Implicit Rewards
TDRM: Smooth Reward Models with Temporal Difference
ProgAgent: A Continual RL Agent with Progress-Aware Rewards
RLAnything: Forge Environment, Policy, and Reward Model
Reward Is Enough: LLMs Are In-Context Reinforcement Learners
High-Capacity Value Functions are Efficient Multi-Task Learners

feedback: 本轮从 10 篇扩展到 28 篇，新增 18 篇覆盖 6 个子方向。成功填补了 continual RL + reward model 的交叉空白（ProgAgent），发现了过程奖励（PRIME/TDRM/PRL）作为独立热点方向，以及 RM 微调优于 policy 微调的重要发现（AgentRM）。
strategy_notes: gap-driven 拆分策略有效：以 findings.md 中已识别的研究空白驱动 4 个并行搜索方向，每个方向 2-3 轮 WebSearch 逐步深入。先广搜→筛选高价值→深搜细节的三步法效率高。
